budget.rationale: paper-reasonable single-step lesion budget; each Œî re-runs the real ROM for `horizon` frames from a cached boot+replay checkpoint, so re-runs are incremental (boot paid once per game).

extra.importance_def: Œ£|Œî(candidate-cell value at final frame)| + (#framebuffer cells changed vs baseline) ‚Äî state + render channels

importance_map.note: lesion_importance[i] / oracle_role[i] are aligned to candidate_ram_indices[i]. rank_order lists candidate ordinals most‚Üíleast important. A poked RAM cell never halts the 6502, so boot_run_still_works is ~all true (the screen-change term is the graded 'does behaviour still run' signal).

interaction_blind_spot.note: the WHERE-SINGLE-UNIT-LESIONS-MISS result: Œî_int = E(i,j) ‚àí (E(i)+E(j)) over the top-importance unit pairs (budgeted). A non-zero Œî_int is super/sub-additivity that NO single-unit map can represent ‚Äî the precise blind spot of A2.

extra.lesion_doset: single-unit {clamp‚Üí0, clamp‚Üíalt=base‚äª0xFF}; per-unit effect = MAX importance over the do-set
extra.oracle_doset: exhaustive {occlude‚Üí0, set‚Üíbase+17, set‚Üíbase+37, clamp‚Üíalt}; per-unit role = MAX importance over the do-set

positive_control.name: oracle-as-method (role map = the exhaustive do-set itself)
positive_control.note: the oracle's OWN importance map must rank-correlate œÅ=1 with the role ‚Äî the harness rewards a perfectly-faithful map, so a single-clamp œÅ<1 is a real measurement, not a broken scorer.

extra.scales_to_cluster_via: tools/cluster/xai_array_jl.sbatch (E0-3): --shard i --nshards n --shard-kind game runs game i of the core set per array task; forward bit-exact to this HARD path.

scores.note: œÅ EXPECTED HIGH ‚Äî a single-unit clamp+re-run is itself an exact intervention, so lesion importance ‚âà the unit's causal role (experiment_design.md ¬ß4 A2). false_specificity = #units the lesion map flags as driving ‚âàone output (specific) that the oracle says actually drive MANY outputs (generic) ‚Äî spurious selectivity.

extra.substrate: jutari (Julia, HARD) ‚Äî real-ROM bit-exact path; every lesion is an EXACT clamp + deterministic re-run on the true ROM.

triad.F_note: Spearman œÅ of the single-unit lesion importance map vs the exact-oracle per-unit causal role (23 units).
triad.M_note: 1 ‚àí false-specificity rate: fraction of lesion-flagged 'specific' units the oracle says are actually generic (spurious selectivity) ‚Äî minimal & at the right level.
triad.S_note: generalisation to a HELD-OUT clamp value: œÅ of the lesion map (built on {0,alt}) vs the per-unit role under the UNSEEN value base+37 (scored on the bit-exact re-run).
triad.interpretation: Phase A calibration baseline (experiment_design.md ¬ß4): the single-unit lesion is a RELATIVELY FAITHFUL classical method (high F) BUT structurally blind to interaction effects (the interaction_blind_spot) and prone to spurious specificity (M<1). 'Right but incomplete' ‚Äî the quantified-Kording lesson for ablation.

oracle_ref: oracle_intervene@seaquest#per-unit causal role (exhaustive do-set, full horizon)
